data.en: How much do you grow in a year?
data.cn: 你一年长高多少？
data.hint: Use 'How much' for uncountable amount/degree. / 用 'How much' 提问程度。

data.en: How do you feel about growing up?
data.cn: 你对长大有什么感觉？
data.hint: Preposition 'about' followed by verb-ing. / 介词 'about' 后接动名词形式。

data.en: At what age can you do these things in China?
data.cn: 在中国，你在什么年龄可以做这些事？
data.hint: Question phrase 'At what age'. / 疑问短语 'At what age' (在什么年龄)。

data.en: You can have an ID card.
data.cn: 你可以拥有一张身份证。
data.hint: Use 'an' before 'ID' (vowel sound /aɪ/). / 在 ID 前用 an。

data.en: You can go to school.
data.cn: 你可以去上学。
data.hint: Modal verb 'can' followed by base verb. / can 后接动词原形。

data.en: You have to pay to go on trains.
data.cn: 你必须付钱才能乘坐火车。
data.hint: 'Have to' means must. / 'Have to' 表示必须。

data.en: You can ride a bike on the road.
data.cn: 你可以在公路上骑自行车。
data.hint: Preposition 'on' for roads. / 表示在路上用介词 on。

data.en: We will learn to use words and expressions about growing up.
data.cn: 我们将学习使用关于长大的词汇和表达。
data.hint: 'Learn to do' something. / 学习做某事用 learn to。

data.en: We will share a growth story.
data.cn: 我们将分享一个成长故事。
data.hint: 'Growth' is the noun form. / growth 是名词形式。

data.en: We will talk about the meaning of growing up.
data.cn: 我们将谈论长大的意义。
data.hint: Talk 'about' a topic. / 谈论关于某事用 talk about。

data.en: Why does Yangyang like growing up with his brother?
data.cn: 为什么洋洋喜欢和他的弟弟一起长大？
data.hint: Auxiliary verb 'does' for singular subject. / 第三人称单数助动词 does。

data.en: This is my little brother Chenchen.
data.cn: 这是我的小弟弟辰辰。
data.hint: Introducing someone. / 介绍某人用 This is。

data.en: He cried a lot and I was not happy.
data.cn: 他经常哭，我不开心。
data.hint: Past tense 'cried' and 'was'. / 过去式 cried 和 was。

data.en: He didn't listen to me and I was angry.
data.cn: 他不听我的，我很生气。
data.hint: Negative past 'didn't' + base verb. / 过去式否定用 didn't + 原形。

data.en: We could play football together.
data.cn: 我们可以一起踢足球。
data.hint: 'Could' is the past of 'can'. / could 是 can 的过去式。

data.en: We go to the same school and we help each other.
data.cn: 我们在同一所学校上学，我们互相帮助。
data.hint: 'Help each other' means mutual help. / help each other 表示互相帮助。

data.en: It's great to grow up together!
data.cn: 一起长大太棒了！
data.hint: 'It is great to do' pattern. / 做某事是很棒的句型。

data.en: He was not a good player, but we were happy.
data.cn: 他不是一个好球员，但我们很快乐。
data.hint: Contrast using 'but'. / 使用 but 表示转折。

data.en: My friends and I were in the park.
data.cn: 我和我的朋友们在公园里。
data.hint: Plural subject uses 'were'. / 复数主语用 were。
accept: I and my friends were in the park.

data.en: The food was very yummy.
data.cn: 食物非常好吃。
data.hint: Past tense of 'be' for food. / food 是不可数名词，过去式用 was。

data.en: What was the summer camp like?
data.cn: 夏令营是什么样的？
data.hint: 'What was ... like?' asks for description. / 询问过去某事怎么样。

data.en: The past seven days were hard but great.
data.cn: 过去的七天很艰辛但很棒。
data.hint: Plural 'days' uses 'were'. / 复数 days 用 were。

data.en: It was very hot and our training was hard.
data.cn: 天气很热，我们的训练很艰苦。
data.hint: Past tense for weather and activity. / 过去式 was。

data.en: I was very tired on the first day.
data.cn: 第一天我很累。
data.hint: Preposition 'on' for specific days. / 在具体某天前用 on。

data.en: My teacher and friends were kind and helpful.
data.cn: 我的老师和朋友们都很亲切且乐于助人。
data.hint: Compound subject uses 'were'. / 复数主语用 were。

data.en: After the first day, I was much better.
data.cn: 第一天之后，我感觉好多了。
data.hint: 'Much better' for comparison. / much better 表示好得多。

data.en: On the third day, we cooked lunch on our own.
data.cn: 在第三天，我们自己做了午饭。
data.hint: 'On our own' means by ourselves. / on our own 表示独自/靠自己。
accept: We cooked lunch on our own on the third day.

data.en: We were not good at cooking, but we had a good time together.
data.cn: 我们不擅长烹饪，但我们在一起度过了愉快的时光。
data.hint: Contrast and plural 'were'. / be good at 擅长；have a good time 玩得开心。

data.en: It was the feeling of growing up.
data.cn: 那是长大的感觉。
data.hint: Noun phrase 'the feeling of'. / ...的感觉。

data.en: Last year, we were in Harbin for the winter holiday.
data.cn: 去年，我们在哈尔滨度寒假。
data.hint: Past tense for last year. / 过去时间状语配过去式 were。

data.en: Growing up means a lot.
data.cn: 长大意味着很多。
data.hint: Gerund subject is singular. / 动名词作主语看作单数，谓语用 means。

data.en: Birthday time at last! I'm growing so fast!
data.cn: 终于到生日时间了！我长得真快！
data.hint: Present continuous for current process. / 现在进行时表示正在发生的变化。

data.en: We try new things. We sometimes fall.
data.cn: 我们尝试新事物。我们有时会摔倒。
data.hint: Present tense for general facts. / 一般现在时表示常态。

data.en: But every day, we learn and grow.
data.cn: 但每一天，我们都在学习和成长。
data.hint: General present tense. / 每一天 learn and grow。

data.en: What are the girl and the boy talking about?
data.cn: 女孩和男孩在谈论什么？
data.hint: Present continuous question. / 现在进行时提问正在谈论的内容。

data.en: Simba was a baby lion. His dad was the lion king.
data.cn: 辛巴曾是一只小狮子。他的爸爸曾是狮子王。
data.hint: Narrating a past story. / 讲述过去的故事用 was。

data.en: Simba's uncle was very bad. He wanted to be the king.
data.cn: 辛巴的叔叔很坏。他想当国王。
data.hint: Possessive 's and past tense. / Simba's 辛巴的；wanted 想要。

data.en: He killed Simba's dad.
data.cn: 他杀死了辛巴的爸爸。
data.hint: Past tense of kill is 'killed'. / 动词过去式 killed。

data.en: Life was hard for Simba, but he never gave up.
data.cn: 对辛巴来说生活很艰辛，但他从未放弃。
data.hint: Contrast and past tense. / gave up 是 give up 的过去式。

data.en: We all have to face difficulties and learn to grow up.
data.cn: 我们都必须面对困难并学会长大。
data.hint: 'Face difficulties' means confront problems. / face difficulties 面对困难。

data.en: Last year, my hair was long.
data.cn: 去年，我的头发很长。
data.hint: Hair is uncountable, uses 'was'. / 去年对应的过去式是 was。

data.en: I helped my friend clean the classroom.
data.cn: 我帮助我的朋友打扫了教室。
data.hint: Past tense of help. / 过去式 helped。

data.en: At age twelve, you can ride a bike on the road.
data.cn: 在十二岁，你可以在公路上骑自行车。
data.hint: 'At age twelve' means when 12. / 在12岁时。

data.en: Last week, I was at a summer camp.
data.cn: 上周，我在夏令营。
data.hint: Past tense for last week. / 上周用 was。

data.en: Last year, I learnt to play the piano.
data.cn: 去年，我学习了弹钢琴。
data.hint: British spelling 'learnt'. / 英式拼写 learnt。

data.en: It was not easy.
data.cn: 这不容易。
data.hint: Negative past tense. / 过去式否定 was not。

data.en: Look at all the little eggs!
data.cn: 看所有这些小卵！
data.hint: Imperative sentence. / 祈使句 Look at。

data.en: It's sleeping in a shell.
data.cn: 它正在一个壳里睡觉。
data.hint: Present continuous for current state. / 正在发生的状态用 is sleeping。

data.en: Oh! It's growing up.
data.cn: 哦！它正在长大。
data.hint: Current growth process. / is growing 表示正在成长。

data.en: Now, it's a beautiful butterfly.
data.cn: 现在，它是一只美丽的蝴蝶。
data.hint: Current result. / it's = it is。
